parameters.query:
SELECT 1 AS found FROM workflow_steps 
WHERE step_key = 'MX04_ATTACH:{{ $json.event_id }}'
  AND status = 'DONE'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO events (event_type, payload, source_system, source_flow)
VALUES (
  CASE 
    WHEN '{{ $json.doc_type }}' = 'PROJECT_ORDER' THEN 'PROJECT_FILES_READY'::event_type
    ELSE 'ATTACHMENTS_STORED'::event_type
  END,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'doc_type', '{{ $json.doc_type }}',
    'superchat_message_id', '{{ $json.superchat_message_id }}',
    'project_number', '{{ $json.project_number }}',
    'files', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.files) }}'::jsonb,
    'file_count', {{ $json.file_count }},
    'source_event_id', '{{ $json.event_id }}'
  ),
  'n8n',
  'MX_05_Attachment_Processor'
)
RETURNING id::text, event_type::text;

INSERT INTO workflow_steps (step_key, step_type, status, payload, completed_at)
VALUES (
  'MX04_ATTACH:{{ $('📋 Extract Data').first().json.event_id }}',
  'MX04_ATTACHMENT_PROCESSOR',
  'DONE',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'files_processed', {{ $('📦 Aggregate Results').first().json.file_count }},
    'output_event_id', '{{ $json.id }}'
  ),
  now()
)
ON CONFLICT (step_key) DO NOTHING;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, files_processed: $('📦 Aggregate Results').first().json.file_count, event_id: $('📢 Event ATTACHMENTS_STORED').first().json.id } }}
